name: Jack's Veggie Burger (Gr)
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a grill and allow it to reach the desired temperature.
2. In a large mixing bowl, mash the lentils until smooth.
3. Add all other ingredients and mix thoroughly until combined.
4. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Form into burgers.
6. Brush the burgers with olive oil.
7. Grill for 6 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
8. Serve hot with your favorite condiments.
